title: [FIRRTL] (eq) 0-width error. LowerToRTL couldn't handle this operation

features.name: zero-width unsigned integer in comparison operation
features.description: Code should include a comparison operation (eq, neq, lt, gt, le, ge) where at least one operand is a zero-width unsigned integer type (0-bit width)

features.name: zero-width wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a wire or port declaration with zero width (0 bits) which is not synthesizable in Verilog
